name: XDeskClock
short_description: XDeskClock is a lightweight personalized clock program for your desktop.You can download more than 400+ beautiful clocks from the built-in online workshop gallery with just one-click.
detailed_description:
XDeskClock is a lightweight personalized clock program for your desktop.You can download more than 400+ beautiful clocks from the built-in online workshop gallery with just one-click.

Features

  • Personalize your desktop and bring hundreds pretty clock to your desktop.
  • Use the build-in online gallery and download ALL Clocks (more than 470+) with just one-click.
  • Wide variety of designs (modern, vintage, hi-tech, steampunk, real brands etc) and types (digital, analog, pendulum, flip). From simple style to complicated designs with extra animations and sounds)
  • Smooth animations without impact on the pc's performance.
  • Support for displaying weather,system state (HDD,CPU,RAM,SWAP,Battery) and date information.
  • XDeskClock can be used in parallel to any other Steam game or application.
  • Support Steam Cloud Sync Settings and Clocks.
  • Minimum CPU and RAM usage.

FAQ

Q: How to resize clock?
A: Right click the clock and select menu item "Window>>Zoom" to resize clock.
